summary: GoalPilot AI MVP fully tested. Backend: 19/19 pytest tests passed (100%) covering auth, goals + AI plan generation via Claude Sonnet 4.5, tasks, dashboard stats, weekly review, free-plan goal limit (402), and mocked subscription upgrade. Frontend: end-to-end mobile flow validated — welcome -> register -> dashboard -> 4-step goal creation -> AI plan generation (~30s) -> goal detail with milestones/weekly plan -> task on dashboard -> profile -> pricing (3 plans) -> weekly review with AI summary. All major testIDs present and interactive.

ui_bugs.issue: testID `level-beginner` not detected by Playwright — actual level keys may differ from {beginner,intermediate,advanced}. Did not block goal creation (AI plan, tasks created successfully). Worth verifying level option keys.

issues: Console warns: 'shadow*' style props deprecated, use 'boxShadow' (non-blocking)

react_native_issues.issue: Expo expects different versions: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@2.2.0 (got 3.0.2), expo-linear-gradient ~15.0.8 (got 55.0.13), expo-secure-store ~15.0.8 (got 55.0.13), react-native-svg 15.12.1 (got 15.15.4). App still works on web preview but flagged for Expo compatibility.

action_items: (Optional) Verify level option keys in goal/new.tsx match testIDs `level-beginner`, `level-intermediate`, `level-advanced`.
(Optional) Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow and Image style.resizeMode with props.resizeMode to silence warnings.
(Optional) Align Expo dep versions (async-storage, expo-linear-gradient, expo-secure-store, react-native-svg) for native build compatibility.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] together with allow_credentials=True — browsers reject this combo. Fine for current Bearer-token auth (no cookies) but brittle if cookies are added later.
JWT_SECRET is committed in /app/backend/.env — acceptable for dev only.

Streak logic in /api/dashboard/stats has a subtle issue: a `continue` inside a fixed `for i in range(60)` will keep iterating without breaking even when day-1 has zero completions, potentially overcounting non-consecutive days. Consider: if today=0 then i==0 should skip, but day 1 with 0 should still break.
AI JSON parsing strips ```json fences but if Claude returns multiple fences or extra prose, fallback structure (empty plan) is silently used — should log raw response and surface to user.

success_rate.frontend: ~96% (1 minor testID miss out of full E2E flow)

seed_data_creation: Created unique test users (uitest_<uuid>@goalpilot.ai and tester_<uuid>@goalpilot.ai) plus one goal each (auto-deleted at end of pytest run). UI test user remains in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_goalpilot_api.py is ready for regression. Goal creation depends on Emergent LLM key (claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929) and takes ~25-30s; ensure timeout >=60s. Free plan limit returns 402 when a 2nd active goal is attempted. Use unique emails per run since /api/auth/register rejects duplicates with 400. Frontend uses expo-router; pages routed at /, /login, /register, /dashboard, /goals, /review, /profile, /goal/new, /goal/[id], /pricing.
rca_of_issue: No blocking bugs found. The single minor testID miss (`level-beginner`) did not affect end-to-end success because the AI goal plan was generated and goal/[id] page rendered milestones, weekly plan, and a today task appeared on the dashboard.
